top_signals.title: Stablecoin infrastructure firm Trace Finance raises $32 million Series A, says valuation grew 10x from seed
top_signals.summary: CoinFund led the round, with Coinbase Ventures, Haun Ventures, Jump Capital, Paxos, Chainlink Labs and others participating.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: WNBA's Dallas Wings Reaping Benefits From Draft Choices
top_signals.summary: The WNBA's Dallas Wings are reaping benefits in the standings and on their books from having back-to-back No. 1 draft choices, improving their won-loss record and boosting ticket revenue, according to Chief Executive Officer Greg Bibb. He speaks with Bloomberg's Julie Fine. (Source: Bloomberg)
